_note: Committed reconciliation-eval baseline (ADR-0008). The eval gate asserts no regression vs these. Update deliberately (with justification) when reconciliation behavior intentionally improves, like the golden characterization tests. UPDATED for Axis B phrase-snap (ADR-0011): the pipeline is now reconcile -> snap -> oracle. The conservative PhraseSnapper (HIGH=90, LOW=60, MARGIN=15) recovered all 3 previously not-found near-misses (filler / misheard_callsign / word_split), each scoring >=94.7 against the correct phrase with a >=20-point runner-up margin, so match went 9 -> 12 and not_found went 3 -> 0. wrong_match stayed 0 (the safety bar). abstain is 0 here because every recoverable miss in this curated set cleared the HIGH band cleanly; the abstain band populates once mid-confidence cases (LOW<=best<HIGH) enter the dataset or telemetry. UPDATED for punctuation folding in the snapper's normalizer: real operator evidence 'TACAN Air-to-Air' used to abstain (the hyphen made token_sort_ratio 75 vs the stored 'TACAN Air to Air'); folding connector punctuation to spaces restores the exact 100 match (runner-up 'TACAN Air refuel' 68.8, margin 31.2 > 15), so it snaps. Added that case (+ the two real near-miss distractors as commands), total 12 -> 13, match 12 -> 13, wrong_match still 0. UPDATED for ADR-0012 command surfaces: added mission F10 evidence (AI_ATC long prompt, FLEX NORTH, Action FLEX NORTH, Request a FLEX NORTH). The legacy snap/oracle path does not model typed F10 dispatch, so Action/Request aliases abstain and the long prompt is the intentional typed-resolver exception; wrong_match remains 0. UPDATED to grow the AI ATC mission-F10 evidence from docs/AI_ATC_EXAMPLE_CALLS.md (the community 'AI ATC' Nellis mission): added static departure-route surfaces FLEX WEST / DREAM 7 / FYTTR 7 / MORMON MESA 8 to the command set plus 7 golden rows -- clean menu-label matches, spoken-number variants ('dream seven', 'mormon mesa eight') that reconcile to the numeric surface, and Action/Request aliases that abstain. total 17 -> 24, match 14 -> 19, abstain 2 -> 4 (each new abstain is near-miss recoverable), not_found and wrong_match unchanged (still 0). No new long_prompt row was added: the snapped long sentence keeps the surface inside the near-miss top-N, which would double-count against the recoverability invariant in test_misses_are_recoverable. UPDATED with the real 2026-06-20 live smoke: ElevenLabs produced exact 'Voice command assist', the typed mission surface resolved, and send-time lookup dispatched current ActionIndex 6. Added as a clean real_operator/live_dispatch row: total 24 -> 25, match 19 -> 20, wrong_match remains 0.
